subcodes.first_line: God testifieth that there is none other God but Him. His is the dominion in the Kingdom of Utterance, and His the sovereignty in the realm of knowledge [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو له الامر فی ملکوت البیان و له الحکم فی جبروت العلم
subcodes.subjects: @exhortations and counsels, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
